subject: Re: M crashes when creating species
body:
Hi Claris,

Were you (or anyone else for that matter) able to find a solution to this 
error?

We have been encountering the same error *sometimes*.
Deleting the new species folder (if any) and attempting to the same steps 
to create a new species, which then *sometimes* completes without error.

We also sometimes are able to create a species, but then encounter this 
error after completing a refinement cycle.
All of the files are written out for the refinement cycle, but attempting 
to continue results in a different error.

Our group switched recently our data storage configuration, and thus we are 
trying to determine whether an aspect of the reconfiguration may be the 
cause.
The main bottleneck in trouble-shooting with our IT staff is that the error 
isn't reproducible...

Any advice will be greatly appreciated for this case as well!

Best,
-Tom  


On Sunday, November 7, 2021 at 8:44:57 PM UTC-8 cla...@anaphase.org wrote:

> Hi everyone,
>
> I've been trying to create a species in M but it keeps crashing after the 
> "training denoising" step. The following error message appears (see below) 
> in which it can't seem to find a particular file. I've checked the folder 
> and the file is there which puzzles me. I was wondering if anyone has 
> encountered this before? Any advice will be greatly appreciated -- thanks 
> in advance!
>
